allow: PowerShell($token = gh auth token; git -c "http.extraHeader=Authorization: token $token" push --force-with-lease origin fix/critical-security-issues 2>&1)

PowerShell($token = gh auth token; $remote = "https://24Skater:$token@github.com/24Skater/vbs-app.git"; git push $remote fix/critical-security-issues`:fix/critical-security-issues --force-with-lease 2>&1)
PowerShell($token = gh auth token; $remote = "https://24Skater:$token@github.com/24Skater/vbs-app.git"; git push $remote fix/critical-security-issues`:fix/critical-security-issues --force 2>&1)
Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('next:', p.dependencies.next, 'eslint:', p.devDependencies?.eslint || p.dependencies?.eslint || 'not installed'\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); hooks=d.get\('hooks',{}\); [print\(k,'->',v\) for k,v in hooks.items\(\)]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); hooks=d.get\('hooks',{}\); print\(json.dumps\(hooks, indent=2\)\)")
PowerShell($token = gh auth token; $remote = "https://24Skater:$token@github.com/24Skater/vbs-app.git"; git push $remote fix/critical-security-issues`:fix/critical-security-issues 2>&1)

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\).split\('__NEXT_DATA__'\)[1].split\('</script>'\)[0].lstrip\(' type=\\"application/json\\" nonce=\\"[^\\"]*\\">'\)\); err=d.get\('err',{}\); print\(err.get\('message','no error'\)[:200] if err else 'OK'\)")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); const keys = Object.keys\({...p.dependencies,...p.devDependencies}\); const csv = keys.filter\(k => k.includes\('csv'\) || k.includes\('papaparse'\) || k.includes\('xlsx'\)\); console.log\('CSV libs:', csv.length ? csv : 'none'\); console.log\('All:', keys.join\(', '\)\)")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } | Select-Object Id, Name, StartTime)
